## Meeting Purpose

[Panel interview with Faustine Hom for Events Marketing Manager role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Faustine presented a comprehensive events strategy, including CMO breakfasts, executive dinners, industry happy hours, and an annual summit](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [She emphasized creating value through community building and experiential marketing rather than hard selling](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [GrowthX currently finds most success with breakfast events and virtual workshops, but sees potential for improvement in promotion and follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Budget flexibility exists for high-impact events, with a focus on relationship-building given GrowthX's high ACVs](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)

## Topics

### Faustine's Event Strategy Overview

  - [Proposed four main event types: CMO breakfasts, executive dinner series, industry happy hours, and annual summit](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Emphasized creating frameworks and playbooks for each event type](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Focused on selecting the right audience, promotion strategies, and day-of logistics](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Suggested a cadence of 1-2 monthly CMO events, quarterly happy hours, and an annual summit](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### CMO Breakfast Format

  - [Target audience: CMOs, growth leaders (director+) from early to mid-stage growth companies](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Venue: San Francisco office to save costs](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Format: 2.5-hour event, roundtable discussions, no panels or pitches](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Attendee mix: 70% prospects, 30% existing customers as advocates](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Promotion: Use Clay/Apollo for list building, Luma for registration](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Budget: Approximately $1.5K for food, swag, and signage](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Executive Dinner Series

  - [Focus: CEOs and founders, more intimate setting](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Venue: High-end restaurant private rooms](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Format: 3-hour event, strategic seating arrangements, icebreaker questions](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Partnerships: Potential co-hosting with VCs or partners](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Logistics: Personalized invitations, table questions, place cards](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)

### Annual Summit

  - [Scale: 150-200 growth leaders, full-day event plus evening reception](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
  - [Venue options: Shack 15, Terra Gala, The Pearl](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Content: Keynote, case studies, panels, interactive workshops, breakout sessions](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [Special elements: VIP dinner for 20 selected CMOs, interactive stations (e.g., Robo coffee station, AI genius bar)](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Budget: Around $24K for full-day venue, meals, and VIP dinner](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)

### Event ROI and Priorities

  - [Faustine's experience: Virtual workshops and webinars showed highest ROI at Notion](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=2102.0)
  - [GrowthX current success: Breakfast events (low effort, high quality) and virtual workshops](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
  - [Challenge: Ensuring consistent attendance for in-person events](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)
  - [Opportunity: Improving promotion and follow-up processes for virtual workshops](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=2312.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to review Faustine's detailed document](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=2557.0)
  - [Consider implementing a hybrid format combining speaker sessions with workshops](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
  - [Explore budget flexibility for high-impact events, focusing on relationship-building](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=2437.0)
  - [Evaluate potential for hosting more events in GrowthX office to reduce costs](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=2532.0)
  - [Regroup internally to discuss next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/ksXyNYTkCd9WL1XCv92aXsWdS_mxRMBy?tab=summary&timestamp=2557.0)
